title: rubus radula subsp. menkei
intro: Rubus radula subsp. menkei, also known as Menke's rasp or Menke's bramble, is a subspecies of the Rubus radula plant, a type of thorny shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The Rubus radula subsp. menkei plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Rubus radula subsp. menkei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
